focus_area: Stack shoulders over hips over your supporting foot. — Turn à la seconde (19 rotations) (0:00)

top_cues.cue: Stack shoulders over hips over your supporting foot.
top_cues.why: Tilting off the vertical axis is the most common reason a pirouette falls out — rotation can't be sustained off-axis.
top_cues.drill: Quarter- and half-turn pirouettes focusing only on finishing in perfect balance, before attempting full rotations.

top_cues.cue: Keep your working leg at hip height — don't let it drop as you turn.
top_cues.why: The à la seconde position must be maintained throughout the turn; a dropping leg shifts your center of mass sideways and collapses the line of the turn.
top_cues.drill: Standing à la seconde holds at the barre: lift the working leg to 90° and hold for 5 s, focusing on the hip flexor maintaining height. 10 reps each side.
